## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Changes

<!-- Bullet list of the meaningful changes. Focus on what changed, not the diff. -->

-
-

## Type

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, config

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? Describe what you ran, not what you read. -->

- [ ] `uv run pytest -v` passes (backend changes)
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run format:check && npx tsc --noEmit` passes (frontend changes)
- [ ] Manually verified in browser / curl (user-facing changes)

## Definition of Done checklist

- [ ] Code reviewed by the other person
- [ ] File headers updated (`Last Modified By`, `Last Modified` entry added)
- [ ] Public functions / components have docstrings / JSDoc
- [ ] No secrets in code; new env vars added to `.env.example`
- [ ] `PLANNING_tasks.md` task ticked ✅ (if this closes a sprint task)
